doctor.clue: person trained to treat people who are ill

nurse.clue: person trained to care for the sick, especially in a hospital

teacher.clue: person whose job is to help students learn

artist.clue: person who creates paintings, sculptures, or other art

judge.clue: public official appointed to decide cases in a court of law

baker.clue: person who makes and sells bread and cakes

farmer.clue: person who owns or manages a farm

mechanic.clue: person who repairs and maintains machinery

scientist.clue: person who studies or has expert knowledge in science

police.clue: civil force responsible for maintaining public order

firefighter.clue: person whose job is to extinguish fires

actor.clue: person who performs in plays, movies, or television shows

writer.clue: person who writes books, stories, or articles

engineer.clue: person who designs, builds, or maintains engines, machines, or structures

designer.clue: person who plans the look or workings of something

architect.clue: person who designs buildings and supervises their construction

dentist.clue: person qualified to treat the diseases and conditions of the teeth

surgeon.clue: medical practitioner qualified to practice surgery

veterinarian.clue: person qualified to treat diseased or injured animals

psychologist.clue: expert or specialist in the study of the mind

therapist.clue: person skilled in a particular kind of therapy

lawyer.clue: person who practices or studies law

banker.clue: person who manages or owns a bank

accountant.clue: person whose job is to keep or inspect financial accounts

analyst.clue: person who examines data or systems in detail

journalist.clue: person who writes for newspapers, magazines, or news websites

photographer.clue: person who takes photographs, especially as a job

editor.clue: person who prepares or corrects written material for publication

librarian.clue: person in charge of or assisting in a library

cashier.clue: person who handles payments and receipts in a store or bank

manager.clue: person responsible for controlling or administering an organization

supervisor.clue: person who oversees and directs the work of others

director.clue: person who supervises the actors and staff of a movie or play

producer.clue: person responsible for the financial and managerial aspects of a movie or broadcast

musician.clue: person who plays a musical instrument or is musically talented

dancer.clue: person who dances, especially as a profession

athlete.clue: person who is proficient in sports and other forms of physical exercise

coach.clue: person who trains and directs an athlete or sports team

trainer.clue: person who teaches skills or helps with fitness

guard.clue: person who keeps watch or protects something

soldier.clue: person who serves in an army

sailor.clue: person who works as a member of the crew of a commercial or naval ship

marine.clue: member of a body of troops trained to serve on land or at sea

clerk.clue: person employed in an office or bank to keep records or accounts

receptionist.clue: person who greets and assists visitors in an office or hotel
